artworks.title: Quiet Horizon
artworks.description: Placeholder artwork for the Phase 0 prototype. Real pieces from the ME/CFS community will hang here. This plaque is where the artist's own words about the work will live.

artworks.title: Ember Hour
artworks.description: Placeholder artwork for the Phase 0 prototype. A wide, warm piece to test how landscape formats sit on the floating panels.

artworks.title: Thicket
artworks.description: Placeholder artwork for the Phase 0 prototype. A smaller portrait piece to test scale variation between works.

artworks.title: Low Tide, Slow Light
artworks.description: Placeholder artwork for the Phase 0 prototype. The last stop of the tour, to test the end-of-room moment.
